name: spillover
description: David Quammen's 'Spillover: Animal Infections and the Next Human Pandemic' — the definitive account of zoonotic diseases, how animal viruses jump to humans, and why the next pandemic is a question of when, not if. Covers Hendra, SARS, Ebola, Nipah, HIV/AIDS, and the science of spillover events.
useCase: Understanding zoonotic diseases, how pandemics start, the ecology of emerging viruses, spillover risk factors, and what can be done to prevent the next pandemic.
knownRisks: Contains graphic descriptions of disease and death
Some virology details may be dense
Written pre-COVID (2012) — prescient but not updated
The ecological sections may feel slow to some readers
